name: SHORE BANCSHARES INC
business: Shore Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company for Shore United Bank, N.A., which provides consumer and commercial banking products and services, secondary mortgage lending, trust, wealth management, and financial planning services to individuals and businesses primarily in Maryland, Delaware, and Virginia. The company also offers title services through a subsidiary, but those operations ceased as of March 31, 2025. Its business strategy focuses on organic and strategic growth within its geographic footprint, including the acquisition of The Community Financial Corporation in 2023.

exposures.sentence: The Bank provides banking services to customers that are licensed by various states to do business in the cannabis industry as growers, processors and dispensaries.

Cybersecurity risks for banking organizations have significantly increased in recent years in part because of the proliferation of new technologies, including artificial intelligence, and the use of the internet and telecommunications technologies to conduct financial transactions.
We also compete with financial technology companies seeking to disrupt conventional banking markets.
